lecture_action: Create an independent risk function with authority over trading activity
control_artifact: Risk mandate, new-product approval, trader/risk separation, escalation owner
failure_prevented: Rogue traders using process knowledge to hide trades

lecture_action: List every material source of risk before sizing the strategy
control_artifact: Market, credit, financial, regulatory, operational, liquidity, and disaster taxonomy
failure_prevented: Treating a non-price risk as if it were ordinary market volatility

lecture_action: Measure the risk using sensitivities, what-if grids, VaR/CVaR, stress tests, and credit loss formulas
control_artifact: Greek report, scenario cube, VaR/CVaR report, PD x LGD x EAD, liquidity-adjusted loss
failure_prevented: A strategy looking safe only because the measurement omitted tail or liquidity loss

lecture_action: Set hard caps by exposure, geography, sector, settlement, margin, order count, and price band
control_artifact: Limit table in the OMS and independent risk-monitoring service
failure_prevented: An otherwise valid strategy becoming too concentrated or cash-settlement constrained

lecture_action: Put controls before orders reach the exchange and monitor them in real time
control_artifact: Heartbeat, stale-data rejection, book sanity, order gate, checksum deployment, kill switch
failure_prevented: Fast automated errors that humans cannot interrupt manually
